name: End-to-End Capability Exercise 20260417
outcome_goal: Exercise agent execution, information handoff, deterministic transformation, search/retrieval, and a database action in one run.

jobs.label: step1_generate_raw_data
jobs.prompt: Write outputs/raw_data.json containing a JSON object with keys `dataset` ("praxis_e2e_exercise_20260417"), `generated_by` ("anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"), and `records` (array of 5 objects with `id`, `severity` low|medium|high, `topic`). Then reply with exactly: {"step":"step1_generate_raw_data","status":"ok","file":"outputs/raw_data.json"}

jobs.label: step2_search_and_handoff
jobs.prompt: Read outputs/raw_data.json and write outputs/search_results.md with the dataset name, record count, a bullet list of the 3 most-severe record topics, and a final `Handoff: OK` line. Then reply with: {"step":"step2_search_and_handoff","status":"ok","file":"outputs/search_results.md"}

jobs.label: step4_database_action
jobs.prompt: Write outputs/bug_receipt.json with content {"bug_id":"deferred","note":"Database action deferred — engine filed the bug out-of-band."}. Then reply with: {"step":"step4_database_action","status":"ok","file":"outputs/bug_receipt.json"}
